finally.translate: окончательно, в конце концов, в конечном счете, в конце, в заключение, под конец

examples.eng: The skies finally cleared.
He finally has a steady job.
examples.ru: В конце концов, он нашёл постоянную работу.

examples.eng: Phew! We finally did it.
in the final minutes of the game
He finally settled down.
The storm finally tapered off.
Finally, Karpov cracked under the pressure.
I finally got to work at home.
She finally realized her goal.
She finally nailed her dream job.
examples.ru: В конце концов, она нашла работу своей мечты.

examples.eng: Many men are finally lost.
He finally has a proper job.
The truth finally dawned on / upon us.
And finally, I'd like to thank the crew.
examples.ru: И наконец, я хотел бы поблагодарить экипаж.

examples.eng: The pain finally remitted.
The snow is finally melting.
The ship finally ported.
the final act of the play
I finally paid off the loan.
Harry finally seduced Sally.
The cost of meat finally fell.
Good prevails finally over evil.
examples.ru: В конце концов добро торжествует над злом.

examples.eng: Finally he's going to rouse himself.
The heroine finally finds true love.
examples.ru: Героиня, в конце концов, находит настоящую любовь.

examples.eng: We must finally address these issues.
Finally he opened freely on the subject.
examples.ru: Наконец он открыто высказался по этому вопросу.

examples.eng: The swimmer finally gained the river bank.
examples.ru: Пловец всё-таки доплыл до берега реки.

examples.eng: The fire was finally brought under control.
The final product was not what we had expected.
What was the final score?
